title: CiabbalePack
description: Collection of Optimization, QoL, GUI, Graphics and terrain generation mods for an astonishing experience. Works with custom and vanilla servers.
body:
### Very brief introduction
This is how I personally like to play the game.
### Less brief introduction, what's this?
CiabbalePack is a collection of Optimization, QoL, GUI, Graphics and terrain generation mods designed to give your minecraft gameplay a breath of fresh air while increasing comfort (QoL), keeping a good performance and adding some multiplayer features.

The game is eventually still vanilla, exception made for the elevator mod.

**And be reassured, even in singleplayer worlds, you're never actually alone.**

### Usage Cases
This modpack is thought for:
1. Keeping good performance in both singleplayer and multiplayer enviroments
   - Note: make sure not to break the server rules when playing online, reconfigure accordingly. Bridging mod and some IPN features are disabled (configure to use).
2. Navigating the game with a new perspective, be it first person or third person with Shoulder Surfing.
**Flying is also changed to flight simulator like controls**
3. Better singleplayer experience with a refreshed world generation using Terralith and Tectonic mods
4. Bring back the Anaglyph 3D visual

### Contacts
In case of accidental license breaching or any request, contact me over discord.

### Credits
All the mods can be found over modrinth

#### Modpack Credits:
This modpack shares some mods with the following modpacks
- Faboulously Optimized
- Aged
- RealisticCraft

Next are included at release, (add yours or) pick your favourite once in-game:
#### Resourcepacks:
- Faithful 64x
- Motschen's Better Leaves
- Pixlli
- Default HD

#### Shaderpacks:
- BSL Shaders
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Bliss
- AstraLex

No external mods are included in the current release.
